content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.semantic_deduplication
FILE: cosmos/memory/semantic_deduplication.py (285 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: Semantic Deduplication System - Autonomous Improvement #4 by Claude Sonnet 4.5

PROBLEM: Memory system can store duplicate/similar conversations, wasting space
SOLUTION: Semantic similarity checking before storage

Uses:
- TF-IDF for fast similarity (no embeddings needed)
- Fuzzy matching for exact 

CLASSES:
- SimilarityMatch: A match between content and existing memory.
- SemanticDeduplicator: Detects and handles duplicate/similar content in memory.

Features:
- TF-IDF sim
  Methods: def add_to_cache(self, memory_id: str, content: str)
  Methods: def check_duplicate(self, new_content: str, check_against: Optional[List[Tuple[str, str]]]=None) -> 
  Methods: def suggest_merge(self, new_content: str, existing_content: str, new_metadata: Optional[Dict]=None, 
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_deduplicator() -> SemanticDeduplicator
- def check_for_duplicate(content: str) -> Optional[SimilarityMatch]
- def add_to_dedup_cache(memory_id: str, content: str)
- def get_dedup_stats() -> Dict
